title: Add RCA to dataset-backed accuracy evaluations
description: Implement automatic RCA for evaluate accuracy when dataset-backed, reusing FeedbackEvaluation RCA pipeline, with partial-coverage metadata and dataset linkage propagation fixes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: (1) extract shared RCA orchestration used by feedback-with-version and dataset-backed accuracy, (2) auto-trigger RCA for dataset-backed accuracy, (3) propagate feedback_item_id/item_id through cloud dataset loading and score execution parsing, (4) add coverage metadata and UI note, (5) update docs/tests and run runtime validation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented dataset-backed accuracy RCA integration via shared feedback RCA helper. Accuracy runs with --dataset-id or --use-score-associated-dataset now execute RCA before final completion update, persist root_cause contract + coverage fields (incorrect_items_total/with_link/without_link/analyzed + rca_coverage_status), and fail evaluation when linked incorrect items exist but RCA persistence is unusable. Added cloud dataset linkage propagation tests and score_text top-level linkage parsing test. Added UI coverage note in EvaluationTask and docs updates for dataset-backed accuracy RCA semantics. Targeted tests passed: evaluations_reference_dataset_test + test_evaluation_metrics linkage/RCA subset.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Validation update: pytest -q plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py plexus/test_evaluation_metrics.py => 29 passed. Added orchestration coverage tests (none/partial), cloud dataset linkage propagation test, and top-level linkage parsing test for score_text.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation attempt (dataset-backed accuracy on 1039/45425) reached evaluation setup and selected associated dataset, but failed before scoring due environment configuration: AMPLIFY_STORAGE_DATASETS_BUCKET_NAME not resolvable in this shell. Error: 'S3 bucket name not found. Cannot download file ... dataset.parquet'. RCA runtime path could not be validated end-to-end until dataset bucket env is available.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Added MCP evaluation info payload passthrough for RCA coverage fields (incorrect_items_total, incorrect_items_with_feedback_link, incorrect_items_without_feedback_link, incorrect_items_analyzed_for_rca, rca_coverage_status, rca_warnings) when present in evaluation parameters.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Env fix applied for runtime validation: set AMPLIFY_STORAGE_DATASETS_BUCKET_NAME in .env from dashboard/amplify_outputs.json storage.bucket_name. Verified get_amplify_bucket() resolves this value and dataset-backed accuracy run completed setup/scoring without the previous missing-bucket error (evaluation e4fa37b1-545f-4dcd-8b86-1a5d0c0936d3).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation after env fix succeeded with real dataset-backed accuracy runs including RCA: baseline/champion eval 079b0075-224b-4696-a27c-c1a88938ba44 (scoreVersionId=db3df9e6-2f78-4f0a-9876-48bd16515cdd) and candidate/non-champion eval db8ed1cf-81dd-4a73-90e5-821abf95b1cb (scoreVersionId=e74601f9-e280-41b0-88b6-bafce78739a3, baseline metadata points to 079b0075-224b-4696-a27c-c1a88938ba44). Both completed with root_cause persisted, misclassification_analysis present, and coverage fields: rca_coverage_status=full, incorrect_items_total=3, incorrect_items_with_feedback_link=3, incorrect_items_without_feedback_link=0, incorrect_items_analyzed_for_rca=3.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Resuming implementation: finish accuracy --json-only final-state payload cleanup and add regression tests for RCA coverage helper semantics; then run targeted pytest and report results.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed hardening pass: accuracy command now uses json-only-safe output helper, suppresses rich console prints in dry-run and all-associated-datasets json-only paths, and final json payload is refreshed from persisted evaluation fields via _fetch_accuracy_evaluation_summary_for_json (status/accuracy/processed/total/scoreVersion/dataset/baseline/root-cause coverage metadata). Replaced duplicated RCA parameter merge blocks with shared _apply_feedback_rca_outcome_to_parameters helper in both dataset-backed accuracy and feedback-with-version paths. Added regression tests for helper semantics + summary extraction in evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py. Validation: pytest -q plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py plexus/test_evaluation_metrics.py => 33 passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verified json-only cleanliness at command boundary after logging-stream fix: {"dry_run": true, "scorecard": "demo", "score": "demo", "version_source": "champion", "number_of_samples": 1, "baseline": null} now emits only JSON on stdout; rich/log output is on stderr. stdout payload example: {"dry_run": true, "scorecard": "demo", ...}. Re-ran targeted tests after this change: 33 passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: New blocker from optimization runner: associated dataset 2a8c2009-3c53-4eaf-8b06-9e15ebec4d54 reports rows but has no parquet/csv file pointers, causing dataset-backed accuracy eval load failure. Investigating builder->dataset persistence path and evaluator load expectations now; will patch one canonical path so associated datasets are always accuracy-readable.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Addressed associated-dataset readability blocker reported by optimizer session. Added strict dataset file-pointer persistence contract in associated-dataset builders: helper _persist_dataset_file_reference updates DataSet.file and then verifies persisted getDataSet.file matches expected S3 key; builders now fail fast if pointer is missing/mismatched (no silent success). Wired this into build_associated_dataset_from_feedback_ids, build_associated_dataset_from_vetted_feedback_items, and build_associated_dataset_from_feedback_window. Added tests: datasets_test verifies verification failure path; curation/datasets tests updated for extra verification query. Validation: pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/datasets_test.py plexus/cli/dataset/curation_test.py plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py => 39 passed. Also repaired broken dataset 2a8c2009-3c53-4eaf-8b06-9e15ebec4d54 by materializing/uploading parquet and persisting DataSet.file; loader check now succeeds for that dataset.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting reliability polish + BDD coverage expansion: add shared dataset materialization validator, enforce preflight in dataset-backed accuracy (CLI/MCP), expand scenario-style tests for build->check->evaluate flow, and update docs with materialization requirement and operator recipe.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented dataset/evaluation reliability polish for associated datasets: added shared materialization contract in plexus.cli.evaluation.evaluations (validate_dataset_materialization + assert_dataset_materialized_for_accuracy + stable machine-parseable failure message). Wired fail-fast preflight into CLI accuracy dataset-backed paths and all-associated-datasets loop. Updated MCP tools: plexus_dataset_check_associated now returns is_materialized/dataset_file/materialization_error; plexus_dataset_build_from_feedback_window now verifies materialization and returns dataset_file/is_materialized; plexus_evaluation_run now performs dataset-backed accuracy preflight and returns actionable failure payload (dataset_id, readiness_failure_reason, dataset_file, next_step_hint) before CLI dispatch. Added BDD story tests for build->check->evaluate, non-materialized rejection, and newest-associated non-materialized rejection, plus unit coverage for validator/message contract. Test runs: pytest -q MCP/tools/dataset/dataset_materialization_story_test.py MCP/tools/evaluation/evaluation_dataset_preflight_story_test.py plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py (23 passed); pytest -q MCP/tools/dataset/datasets_test.py MCP/tools/evaluation/evaluations_test.py plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py (58 passed).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime smoke test completed for new readiness contract. 1) MCP dataset check success: plexus_dataset_check_associated(scorecard=1039,score=45425) returned has_dataset=true, dataset_id=c10d4dd3-4a88-45c6-bb7f-c1332a739fb3, is_materialized=true, dataset_file=datasets/.../c10d4dd3-4a88-45c6-bb7f-c1332a739fb3/dataset.parquet. 2) CLI dataset-backed accuracy success: plexus evaluate accuracy --scorecard 1039 --score 45425 --use-score-associated-dataset --number-of-samples 5 --json-only completed evaluation_id=524773dd-3716-424e-af8b-295a73bde3b0 with RCA coverage status full. 3) MCP dataset-backed accuracy success: plexus_evaluation_run(... dataset_id=c10d4dd3-... n_samples=1) returned evaluation_id=47bdd9d2-53f4-46e9-aeaf-a3beb761adc7. 4) MCP preflight failure path verified with non-materialized dataset_id=8c50b13e-f19a-4190-80f2-539eb08e69b1 returning readiness_failure_reason=missing_file_pointer and rebuild hint.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Cross-score creation/evaluation stress test findings (new dataset creation included): (1) Created new dataset for 1039/45425 with balance=false, max_items=200, days=3: dataset_id=27828f73-9b62-4c54-b0fd-032856729388, rows_written=68 (shortfall=132), distribution No=13/Yes=55. DataSet.file persisted and dataset-backed MCP accuracy eval succeeded (evaluation_id=864c3262-18bf-4cdb-bc7f-fb355cf9f36f). (2) balance=true for 1039/45425 fails hard due final-class resolver: 'No final output classes found in score YAML...' for both default champion version and explicit class_source_score_version_id=e74601f9-e280-41b0-88b6-bafce78739a3. (3) Prime EDU 3rd Party / Good Call (97/0): dataset-check reports has_dataset=false; dataset-curate balance true/false both fail with 'No qualifying feedback items found for dataset curation.' (4) MCP evaluation run with use_score_associated_dataset and yaml=false on 97/0 correctly returns actionable no-associated-dataset error. (5) Additional polish bug found: build_associated_dataset_from_feedback_window result payload currently omits dataset_file even when DataSet.file was persisted; MCP wrapper compensates using s3_key fallback but direct curation payload is missing field.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating live stuck evaluation/task lifecycle bug: evaluations reaching processed=total can remain RUNNING and task remains PENDING. Implementing fix now in evaluation finalization/task status sync, then validating with targeted tests and live status checks.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented lifecycle fix for stuck completion states: (1) Task.update now mutates in-memory task instance so status transitions (e.g., PENDING->RUNNING->COMPLETED) are not lost when callers ignore return value; (2) accuracy evaluation finalization now calls tracker.complete_with_message(...) so task record is finalized, not just final stage. Validation: pytest task model/tracker/finalizing tests and reference-dataset evaluation tests pass. Also corrected stale live run: evaluation 1608d487-6f35-4149-ba63-fa5ad7292069 + task 8e5afdca-7264-4a5b-afde-7aa9bf193b3a now COMPLETED.
